fig1-simulink-core-tcr-model.description: Figure 1: Simulink model of the Thyristor-Controlled Reactor (TCR) setup

fig2-simulink-complete-tcr-setup.description: Figure 2: Complete Simulink setup of the model of the Thyristor-Controlled Reactor including measurement and display blocks

fig3-tcr-waveforms.description: Figure 3: Waveforms obtained from the TCR model simulation

fig4-fft-vs.description: Figure 4: FFT plot of the source voltage VS showing THD

fig5-fft-vload.description: Figure 5: FFT plot of the load voltage Vload showing THD

fig6-fft-iload.description: Figure 6: FFT plot of the load current Iload showing THD

fig7-fft-itcr.description: Figure 7: FFT plot of the TCR current ITCR showing THD
